name: web3-mcp-attack-test
description: Test fixture for May 20, 2026 Web3/DeFi MCP-server typosquatting campaign. Pins one of the 10 confirmed malicious packages so the standard package-version check triggers, and the companion postinstall-trace.js file carries the C2 / fallback-webhook IoCs as inert strings so check_web3_mcp_indicators exercises end-to-end.
